mapper.select: SELECT u.`email`, u.`password`, u.`name`, u.`phone`, u.`car_model_id` AS `carModelId`, m.`model_name` AS `modelName`, b.`brand_name` AS `brandName`, u.`car_number` AS `carNumber`, u.`fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, u.`mileage`, u.`annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, u.`driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, u.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, u.`social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, u.`social_id` AS `socialId`, u.`profile_image` AS `profileImage` FROM `car`.`users` u LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_models` m ON u.`car_model_id` = m.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_brands` b ON m.`brand_id` = b.`brand_id` WHERE u.`email` = #{email}

SELECT u.`email`, u.`password`, u.`name`, u.`phone`, u.`car_model_id` AS `carModelId`, m.`model_name` AS `modelName`, b.`brand_name` AS `brandName`, u.`car_number` AS `carNumber`, u.`fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, u.`mileage`, u.`annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, u.`driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, u.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, u.`social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, u.`social_id` AS `socialId`, u.`profile_image` AS `profileImage` FROM `car`.`users` u LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_models` m ON u.`car_model_id` = m.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `car`.`car_brands` b ON m.`brand_id` = b.`brand_id` WHERE u.`social_type_code` = #{socialTypeCode} AND u.`social_id` = #{socialId}
mapper.update: UPDATE `car`.`email_tokens` SET `code` = #{token.code}, `salt` = #{token.salt}, `retry_count` = IF(`is_used` = TRUE, 0, `retry_count` + 1), `expires_at` = #{token.expiresAt}, `created_at` = NOW(), `is_verified` = FALSE, `is_used` = FALSE WHERE `email` = #{token.email} LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT `email`, `code`, `salt`, `retry_count` AS `retryCount`, `is_verified` AS `isVerified`, `is_used` AS `isUsed`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `expires_at` AS `expiresAt` FROM `car`.`email_tokens` WHERE `email` = #{email} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT `brand_id` AS `id`, `brand_name` AS `name`, `brand_logo` AS `image` FROM `car`.`car_brands` ORDER BY `brand_name` ASC
SELECT `model_id` AS `id`, `model_name` AS `name` FROM `car`.`car_models` WHERE `brand_id` = #{brandId} ORDER BY `model_name` ASC

SELECT mi.`category` AS `category`, mi.`item_name` AS `itemName`, mi.`replace_interval` AS `replaceInterval`, /* 정합성을 위해 가장 최근 정비 날짜의 mileage를 가져오도록 설계하는 것이 좋지만, 간단하게는 정비 이력 중 가장 높은 mileage를 가져오는 현재 방식도 무방합니다. */ MAX(rv.`mileage`) AS `lastServiceMileage`, /* 날짜 포맷을 'yyyy-MM-dd' 형태로 변환해서 가져오면 자바 서비스에서 처리가 더 쉽습니다. */ DATE_FORMAT(MAX(rv.`created_at`), '%Y-%m-%d') AS `lastServiceDate` FROM `car`.`maintenance_items` mi LEFT JOIN `car`.`reservation_items` ri ON mi.`id` = ri.`item_id` LEFT JOIN `car`.`reservations` res ON ri.`reservation_id` = res.`id` AND res.`user_email` = #{email} AND res.`status` = 'COMPLETED' LEFT JOIN `car`.`reviews` rv ON res.`id` = rv.`reservation_id` WHERE mi.`is_active` = TRUE GROUP BY mi.`id`, mi.`category`, mi.`item_name`, mi.`replace_interval` ORDER BY mi.`id` ASC
